description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian dressed in modern urban streetwear, featuring a layered outfit with a hooded jacket over a t-shirt and shorts. The jacket is puffy and has a color-blocked design, with a visible zipper and pockets, and is worn over a long t-shirt that extends below the jacket. He is accessorized with a chunky chain necklace, earrings, and a crossbody bag with a strap hanging at his side. His legs are covered with fitted leggings or tights beneath the shorts, and he wears high-top sneakers. The hairstyle is short on the sides with a voluminous, styled top. The overall appearance is trendy and casual, suitable for a city or neighborhood environment.
description: A trendy adult male pedestrian in layered urban streetwear, accessorized with jewelry and a crossbody bag, standing upright.
description_view_0: Front view showing the layered jacket, t-shirt, necklace, crossbody bag, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, bag strap, and the layered effect of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, bag, and hairstyle, with both arms visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, bag, and the side details of the outfit and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: Layered urban streetwear with a hooded puffer jacket, long t-shirt, shorts over leggings, and a crossbody bag; accessorized with jewelry.
attribute_hairstyle: short sides with voluminous styled top
